name: Play-a-Round Golf Ardmore
about: Play-a-Round Golf Ardmore is an indoor golf and entertainment facility featuring state-of-the-art golf simulators. The venue offers access to over 80 virtual golf courses, including championship-caliber courses like Whistling Straits and Pebble Beach. It provides a range of services, from casual play and leagues to professional instruction and private event hosting, catering to golfers of all skill levels in a comfortable, year-round environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 80 premium virtual courses, including world-famous layouts
Realistic, high-accuracy simulation technology with detailed swing data feedback
BYOB policy with comfortable atmosphere ideal for groups and social events

food_and_drink.notes: Guests may bring food or order from nearby eateries that deliver to the simulators. Snacks, sodas, and water are also available onsite.
Guests may bring their own beer and wine (BYOB) if of legal age. Liquor is not permitted.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed camera-based tracking system used across all bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you are welcome to bring your own clubs, the venue provides all necessary equipment for use with their simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, guests may bring their own beer and wine (BYOB) and snacks. Food can also be ordered from nearby restaurants that deliver directly to your simulator.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the number of players and pace of play. An 18-hole round typically takes between 2-3 hours for a group of four.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and offers activities like mini-golf and other games on the giant screens. They also host junior golf camps and parties for children.
